prompt: Create Express.js auth routes: POST /api/auth/register (clinic + admin user signup), POST /api/auth/login (returns JWT with user info and role), POST /api/auth/refresh-token, POST /api/auth/logout, GET /api/auth/me. JWT should include clinic_id, user_id, role. All routes should work with the users, clinics, and user_clinic_roles tables already created.
